mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.dept_id, dept.dept_name, d.title, d.specialty, d.status FROM doctor d LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id WHERE d.status = 1
SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.dept_id, dept.dept_name, d.title, d.specialty, d.status FROM doctor d LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.status = 1
